game_name: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation combat mechanics available from start
Dual-purpose tool: weapon, defensive deflection, environmental cutting, light source in darkness
Athletic enhancement (jump height, run speed) - foundational Force mechanics
Health restoration, enemy pacification - non-violent advantages
Object throwing, enemy choking - violent Force manipulation
Puzzles requiring Force use or object discovery
Hostile and non-hostile NPCs; alignment choices affect ending

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Mission-based progression with discrete level objectives; tension builds through objective requirements and enemy encounters, relieves upon level completion with Force power allocation rewards

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret locations yield bonus stars for Force power allocation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundation building: standard weapons only, basic stormtrooper encounters, learning FPS mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Force introduction post-Level 3: lightsaber acquisition, Force power tree unlocked, environmental puzzles introduce puzzle-solving, enemy variety expands
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating complexity: alignment path commitment creates divergent challenge, Dark Jedi final confrontation building toward two distinct endings based on playstyle
notable_spikes: Post-Level 3: significant mechanical complexity jump with Force powers and lightsaber introduction
Final levels: convergence toward Jerec and Dark Jedi encounters; alignment choices lock player into narrative/mechanical consequences

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 21 levels contains mandatory objectives that gate progression; levels do not open sequentially until objectives complete
Finding all secrets in a level grants one bonus star for Force power allocation, encouraging exploration beyond mandatory paths

NPC interaction choices throughout game accumulate; harming non-hostile NPCs or collecting dark powers pushes toward dark side ending; avoiding harm and collecting light powers pushes toward light side ending
Levels contain hazards and obstacles solvable through Force powers, lightsaber cutting, or object discovery - multiple solution paths
